top_signals.title: Dollar Steamrolls Peers as Fed Opens Door for 2026 Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: The dollar capped its best day in more than three months as traders rushed to buy the US currency after Federal Reserve officials signaled growing support for interest-rate hikes this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Announcement of the publication of the Governor's interview transcript
top_signals.summary: Statement from the Bank of England
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trace Finance raises $32M for cross-border stablecoin settlement expansion
top_signals.summary: The raise comes as stablecoin regulation advances globally and financial firms invest in infrastructure connecting blockchain payments with traditional banking systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
